insight.headline: Customer API Change
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API's Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field is removed as of version 2026-10. This also removes the Checkout type subtree. The deprecation started prior to this removal.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their code to no longer reference the removed fields. They should also review their usage of the Customer Account API to ensure compatibility with version 2026-10. This change may require updates to GraphQL queries, especially those related to customer checkouts. The removal of the Checkout type subtree may affect how developers handle checkout-related data.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may notice changes in how customer checkout data is handled, but this should not directly impact their store operations. However, merchants should be aware of potential changes in app behavior due to this API update.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it reflects updates to the Customer Account API, which can impact how developers interact with customer data. Staying up-to-date with these changes ensures that apps remain compatible and functional.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: The POS UI extensions API now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. Existing discounts must be updated to represent a per-unit discount.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now provides more control over handling breaking changes to action configuration fields, reducing validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates action runtime URLs on every execution, eliminating the need for manual updates.
The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, including changes to Javy dependencies and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices for all apps.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets to be configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting in API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The React SDK has added typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants, adding variants to cart, and sending buyers to express checkout.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and improving worker-specific resolve configuration.

recap.headline: Shopify updates impact GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and Checkout UI extensions

themes.title: API updates and deprecations
themes.detail: The Customer Account API removed the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types in version 2026-10. Additionally, the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill as of API version 2026-10.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and Markets APIs changes
themes.detail: Shopify Flow now resolves an action’s runtime_url on every execution, and action extensions result in fewer breaking changes. The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing apps using Admin GraphQL 2026-07 to encounter Markets configured with country-subdivision regions.

themes.title: POS UI extensions and App Store requirements
themes.detail: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to further clarify honest and transparent review practices for all apps published to the App Store.

actions.text: Update existing checkout UI extensions to replace useBuyerJourneyIntercept API
Review and update apps to comply with updated App Store requirements policy 1.3
Test and adapt to changes in Customer Account API and OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum
